title: 7 *Marketing* Myths That Are Costing You Money
subtitle: Marketing strategy

title: More content = more *growth*
body: Posting daily without strategy is noise. One well-researched piece per week outperforms seven mediocre ones every time.

title: Email marketing is *dead*
body: Email delivers $36 for every $1 spent. It's the highest ROI channel in digital marketing. Build your list.

title: You need to be on *every* platform
body: Master one channel before expanding. Spreading thin means mediocre presence everywhere and dominance nowhere.

title: Paid ads *replace* organic
body: Ads amplify what already works. If your organic content doesn't convert, throwing money at it won't fix the message.

title: B2B buyers don't use *social*
body: 75% of B2B buyers use social media in purchase decisions. LinkedIn alone influences over 80% of B2B leads.

title: Which myth did *you* believe the longest?
subtitle: Share your experience in the comments
